title: News reader output (untrusted-input → headline+source)
description: Adapted from anthropics/financial-services @ 1c2ece3467c3434ddd01e655970e35b773940a29 — managed-agent-cookbooks/meeting-prep-agent/subagents/news-reader.yaml. Apache 2.0 (preserved). Adapted 2026-05-09 for Mahoraga: this becomes the contract for the Phase-4 news-classifier leaf-worker. Inputs are UNTRUSTED news articles, RSS bodies, or social-media posts; output is a bounded list of (headline, source) pairs that downstream classifiers can label for sentiment / event-type / regime impact.
